response.justification: Sarah has the foundational 15+ years of software engineering experience and demonstrated leadership through multiple staff-level roles and entrepreneurial ventures. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' Her current work on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq (13 months) is promising but insufficient to claim established AI expertise. She lacks the Master's/PhD in AI-related fields and shows no track record of strategic AI platform work or customer advisory on AI adoption—core responsibilities for this director-level AI strategy position.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with demonstrated technical leadership across Staff and Principal roles
Active founder of GISCollective open-source platform showing entrepreneurial vision and ability to build products from conception
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and modern agentic development (MCP frameworks, code generators) at re:cinq indicates recent pivot toward AI specialization
concerns: No demonstrated deep expertise in AI/ML—recent AI infrastructure work (13 months) is insufficient for a 'recognized expertise' requirement in a director-level AI strategy role
Missing Master's or PhD in AI-related field, a preferred qualification for this specialized technical strategy position
Resume shows broad generalist experience across languages and domains rather than strategic focus on cloud and AI platform direction or customer advisory capacity

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI/ML expertise and track record
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure at re:cinq
15+ years experience and demonstrated technical leadership
